title: dask_setup Profile
description: Schema for dask_setup configuration profile YAML files (format version 1.7).

name.description: Unique profile name. Used as the filename stem when saved to disk.

version.description: dask_setup profile format version that created this file (e.g. '1.7'). Written automatically by save_profile(); do not edit by hand.

based_on.description: Name of a parent profile to inherit from. Only fields listed under 'config' in this file override the parent; all other settings are inherited. Supports any builtin, site-wide, or user profile name.

builtin.description: True for builtin profiles shipped with dask_setup. User-created profiles should not set this field (defaults to false).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this profile was first saved. Written automatically by save_profile().

modified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this profile was last saved. Written automatically by save_profile().

config.description: Configuration parameters for DaskSetupConfig. When used with 'based_on', only the fields listed here override the parent profile's values.

workload_type.description: Primary workload classification: 'cpu' (compute-bound), 'io' (I/O-bound), 'mixed' (balanced), or 'auto' (infer from dataset).

max_workers.description: Maximum number of Dask workers. Null means auto-detect from available cores.

reserve_mem_gb.description: Memory (GiB) reserved for the OS and non-Dask processes. Subtracted from total RAM before worker memory is calculated.

max_mem_gb.description: Hard cap on total memory available to the Dask cluster (GiB). Null means no cap beyond available RAM.

dashboard.description: Enable the Dask dashboard. Prints an SSH tunnel hint on HPC systems.

adaptive.description: Enable Dask adaptive scaling (dynamically adds/removes workers based on load).

min_workers.description: Minimum number of workers when adaptive scaling is enabled.

temp_base_dir.description: Base directory for Dask temporary / spill files. Defaults to $PBS_JOBFS when available, otherwise the system temp directory.

dashboard_port.description: Port for the Dask dashboard HTTP server. Null lets Dask choose a free port.

silence_logs.description: Suppress Dask and distributed log output. Recommended for production batch jobs.

memory_target.description: Fraction of worker memory at which Dask starts moving data to disk (spilling).

memory_spill.description: Fraction of worker memory at which Dask aggressively spills to disk.

memory_pause.description: Fraction of worker memory at which Dask pauses task execution.

memory_terminate.description: Fraction of worker memory at which Dask terminates the worker process.

spill_compression.description: Compression algorithm for spilled data. 'auto' lets dask_setup choose based on workload type.

comm_compression.description: Enable compression for inter-worker and scheduler-worker communication. Reduces bandwidth at the cost of CPU time.

spill_threads.description: Number of threads dedicated to disk spill I/O. Null means Dask default. Max 16.

suggest_chunks.description: Automatically print xarray chunk recommendations when a dataset is passed to setup_dask_client().

io_format.description: Override the storage format for I/O optimisation. Null means auto-detect from path/dataset.

io_target_chunk_mb.description: Target chunk size range [min_mb, max_mb] for I/O-optimised chunk recommendations.

io_access_pattern.description: Expected data access pattern for I/O optimisation hints.

io_storage_location.description: Storage tier for I/O optimisation hints. 'auto' infers from path prefix.

io_compression_level.description: Override the compression level (0-9) for I/O optimisation. Null means codec default.

fallback_on_detection_failure.description: Apply a conservative safe default configuration instead of raising an error when resource detection fails.

adaptive_memory.description: Run tune_memory_thresholds() immediately after cluster creation to tighten memory thresholds based on observed spill.

name.description: Internal config name (matches profile name). Populated automatically.

description.description: Human-readable description of this profile's purpose.

examples.name: fat_nodes
examples.description: climate_analysis tuned for 512 GiB fat nodes

examples.name: nci_gadi_io
examples.description: Optimised for NCI Gadi /scratch I/O workloads
